docs.text: AI and Fleets This section covers AI-controlled ships and fleet management in StarMade, including how to configure Bobby AI, assign fleet roles, and coordinate multi-ship combat and logistics.
docs.title: AI and Fleets

docs.text: Combat Overview This section covers the building mechanics in StarMade, including how to construct ships and stations, advanced build mode tools, and tips for efficient building.

docs.text: Combat Overview This section covers the core mechanics of combat in StarMade, including how damage is calculated, how defenses work, and how to build effective combat ships.

docs.text: Getting Started This section is for players new to StarMade. It covers the basics of surviving, navigating, and understanding the game's core systems before diving into more advanced topics.

docs.text: Logic This section covers StarMade's logic system, which allows you to build automated and interactive systems on your ships and stations using logic blocks and activation signals.
